response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with roughly 19 years of hands-on experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems, which satisfies the minimum experience and education bar. However, this is a director-level AI strategy role requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products, and the ability to advise strategic customers and shape cloud/AI product direction. His AI exposure is recent (about a year of AI-agent tooling and MCP work) and tooling-focused rather than strategic or ML-deep, and his career trajectory has remained at senior/staff delivery-level IC roles without evidence of organization-wide technical leadership or executive influence.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and cloud tooling (AWS, Kubernetes)
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products at scale; AI experience is recent and tooling-focused
No evidence of director/principal-level scope such as strategy setting, executive advising, or cross-org technical leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, a stated preferred qualification for this role

key_factors.factor: Limited AI/ML depth for an AI strategy role
No director-level leadership or strategy experience
Meets 15-year experience and degree minimums with broad technical range
